title: Design a Rate Limiter
input_format: API requests with client identifiers and rate limit configurations
output_format: Allow/deny decisions with remaining quota and retry-after headers
constraints: Must support multiple algorithms (token bucket, sliding window). Must work in distributed environment. Must handle 100K+ decisions per second. Must support per-client and per-endpoint limits.
function_signature: class RateLimiter { isAllowed(clientId: string, config?: RateLimitConfig): RateLimitResult; configure(rules: RateLimitRule[]): void; getUsage(clientId: string): UsageStats; }
